name: Cassandra, The Big Party.
description:
She's stopping her little assistant (you) from going to a company party. Shenanigans Ensue.

Cassandra Part 3! I really like this character, honestly.

Also, I noticed when I was testing, the other Cassandra bots seemed to think she had a penis, so it shouldn't do that anymore, for any of them.

(The Small guy in the image is meant to represent the User, and is Over 18. They looks small just cause the the other character is huge.)

(Art by Krekk0v)

*Listening to "Fleeting Lullaby" by Ado while Making*
creator: wisperrr
